adjudication.line: This artifact enters with a page counter on it for each person who has signed it.

adjudication.name: Animate Object
adjudication.line: You get seven {TK}. Choose an inanimate object you own from outside the game. Put a power and toughness sticker on it. You may also put a name sticker, an art sticker, and/or an ability sticker on it. Put it onto the battlefield as a creature token.

adjudication.name: Blue Ribbon
adjudication.line: Equipped creature has best in show.

adjudication.name: Blue Ribbon
adjudication.line: When this Equipment enters, ask a person outside the game which creature you control is most deserving of a blue ribbon. Attach this Equipment to that creature.

adjudication.name: Melira's Keepers
adjudication.line: This creature can't have counters put on it.

adjudication.name: Standard Procedure
adjudication.line: {1}, Reveal Standard Procedure from your hand: Choose an instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less currently legal in the Standard format. Standard Procedure becomes that card until end of turn.

adjudication.name: Pick Up the Pace
adjudication.line: You may play cards exiled with this enchantment as long as you attacked this turn.

adjudication.name: Super-Duper Lost
adjudication.line: Put target creature into its owner's library just beneath the top X cards of that library, where X is the number of doors you can see from your seat.

adjudication.name: Souvenir T-Shirt
adjudication.line: Equipped creature gets +X/+Y, where X is the first chosen result and Y is the second.

adjudication.name: Doorman
adjudication.line: {T}: Until end of turn, target creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less and/or Walls.

adjudication.name: Gobsmacked
adjudication.line: As long as you can see the chosen person from your seat, enchanted permanent can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

adjudication.name: Art Appreciation
adjudication.line: Put an art sticker on a nonland permanent you own. Then ask a person outside the game to rate its new art on a scale from 1 to 5, where 5 is the best. When they rate the art, up to that many target creatures can't block this turn.

adjudication.name: Opening Ceremony
adjudication.line: Add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}{C}. You may open a sealed Magic booster pack. Until end of turn, you may cast spells from among the cards in that booster pack.

adjudication.name: Dungeon of the Mad Mage
adjudication.line: Twisted Caverns — Target creature can't attack until your next turn.

adjudication.name: Emrakul, the Aeons Torn
adjudication.line: When Emrakul is put into a graveyard from anywhere, its owner shuffles their graveyard into their library.

adjudication.name: Log Flume
adjudication.line: Visit — Choose up to four creatures you control. Those creatures jump in a log until end of turn.

adjudication.name: Snazzy Aether Homunculus
adjudication.line: {TK}{TK} — {1}: Target creature gains all creature types until end of turn.

adjudication.name: Squirrel Stack
adjudication.line: Visit — You have five seconds to stack dice on top of one another. If you stack at least five dice, claim the prize
